text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho, where Oguri Cap will to
go head-to-head with Tamamo Cross, has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined not to lose, Tamamo Cross fires right
back at Oguri Cap's declaration of war.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the beginning of the race just moments
away, both of them are excited and eager to run.
